mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dahua_door_group_cache (id, name, org_code, org_name, has_child_channel, memo) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{orgCode}, #{orgName}, #{hasChildChannel}, #{memo}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), org_code = VALUES(org_code), org_name = VALUES(org_name), has_child_channel = VALUES(has_child_channel), memo = VALUES(memo)
